label: 2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 15

extraction.one_line_summary: COSTA Rui won from a breakaway sprint at Lacon Berry, outplaying KÄMNA Lennard and BUITRAGO Santiago with psychological tactics after KÄMNA crashed before the finale.
tactical_patterns: EVENEPOEL Remco forced Jumbo-Visma to police early breakaway composition by joining initial 24-rider move before acceptable group formed.
COSTA Rui deliberately argued with breakaway companions BUITRAGO and KÄMNA to disrupt cooperation before final sprint, proving psychological warfare effective.
KÄMNA Lennard crashed on corner misjudgment while soloing for glory after bridging to BUITRAGO and COSTA, revealing overconfidence vulnerability.

rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: neutral: appeared short of resources in finale but still hunting KOM points, suggesting stage win secondary to jersey competition
rider_signals.COSTA Rui: positive: demonstrated elite breakaway gamesmanship by creating dissent among companions before executing winning sprint after decade-long Grand Tour stage drought
rider_signals.KÄMNA Lennard: negative: tactical impatience caused crash when attacking alone instead of managing three-up situation to sprint finish
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: negative: crashed again with rest day approaching, accumulating damage that questions durability for final week
rider_signals.KUSS Sepp: positive: holding red jersey into rest day despite third Grand Tour of season raising fatigue questions about final week
